Title: Heather need of urgent assist regarding a file she needs
Notes:
Summary:
Received a call from Heather at KES regarding an issue with a missing file. She had accidentally overwritten the file and was seeking to recover the previous version. After attempting to recover the file through M365 and iCloud, and checking on iMac, the older version could not be found.

Actions Taken:

  1. Connected to Heather’s Mac and searched for the file, but was unable to locate the oldest version due to system limitations.

  2. Attempted recovery using M365 and iCloud version history, but was unsuccessful.

  3. Discovered that Heather has two Mac devices, and one of them was powered off.

  4. Stopped all internet connections on both devices.

  5. Powered on the old Mac device that had the old version of the file.

  6. Recovered the file with a new naming convention and made a copy.

  7. Re-enabled the internet connection and allowed iCloud sync to complete.

  8. Successfully recovered the old file version.

Next Steps:

  • No further steps required as the file recovery was successful.

Status: Issue resolved and file recovery completed; ticket closed.
